subject: App cannot be opened because it is damaged
description: Downloaded internal tool shows Gatekeeper 'damaged' dialog; user cannot launch.

ts_steps.title: Re-download
ts_steps.action: Delete app, download fresh copy from approved source, verify checksum if published.

ts_steps.title: Quarantine attribute
ts_steps.action: If policy allows: xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /path/to/App.app in Terminal (document approval).

ts_steps.title: Privacy & Security
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Privacy & Security — if app blocked, use Open Anyway once after explicit user intent.

internal_information: Quarantine flag or incomplete download. Do not bypass Gatekeeper for unknown binaries. Security team for unsigned builds.
